name: Donia Pulse AI — Master Workflow v1.0

nodes.name: 📥 WhatsApp Webhook Entry
nodes.notes: Entry point for ALL WhatsApp messages across all clients. Meta sends all events here.

nodes.name: 🔍 Validate & Extract Payload
nodes.notes: Validates Meta signature, extracts message data, identifies client via WABA ID.

nodes.name: 🔀 Is Valid Message?
nodes.notes: Route only real messages. Discard status updates and non-message events.

nodes.name: ✅ ACK to Meta (200 OK)
nodes.notes: CRITICAL: Must respond 200 to Meta within 5 seconds or messages will be re-sent.

nodes.name: 🔥 Fetch Client Config (Firebase)
nodes.notes: Real-time fetch from Firebase. Every message triggers a fresh config read = zero restart needed.

nodes.name: 🛡️ Client Guard & Kill Switch
nodes.notes: Multi-layer security gate: Kill Switch, Maintenance Mode, Subscription Expiry.

nodes.name: 🔒 Safety Filter (Guardrails)
nodes.notes: Pre-AI filter. Blocks politics, religion, adult content, violence, custom keywords.

nodes.name: 🌍 Language Detection
nodes.notes: Detects AR/FR/EN via Unicode + keyword scoring. Respects manual override from dashboard.

nodes.name: 📚 Fetch Chat History
nodes.notes: Retrieves conversation history for context. Last 10 messages to stay within token limits.

nodes.name: 📝 Build AI Prompt
nodes.notes: Constructs the full LLM payload: brand system prompt + language rule + history + user message.

nodes.name: 🤖 OpenAI GPT-4o
nodes.notes: Calls OpenAI API. Model, temperature, max_tokens all come from Firebase client config.

nodes.name: 📤 Send WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: Sends reply via Meta Cloud API. Phone number ID and token are client-specific from Firebase.

nodes.name: 🚫 Send Blocked Message
nodes.notes: Sends appropriate fallback message for kill switch, expired subscription, etc.

nodes.name: ⏰ Subscription Alert CRON (6h)
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours to check for subscriptions expiring within 48 hours.

parameters.subject: ⚠️ تنبيه: اشتراكك ينتهي خلال 48 ساعة — Donia Pulse AI
parameters.message:
⚠️ تنبيه انتهاء الاشتراك

عزيزي {{ $json.business_name }}،

نود إعلامك بأن اشتراكك في خدمة Donia Pulse AI سينتهي في:

{{ $json.subscription.expiry_date }}

يرجى التجديد في أقرب وقت لضمان استمرارية الخدمة.


DONIA LABS TECH — contact@donialabs.tech
